- White diamond (W) is at [21, 8] with orange center - this is the bottom-left position
- Dark gray diamond (G) is at [18, 57] with orange center - this is in the purple diamond outline

- Dark gray diamond (G) at [35, 45] with purple center - middle bottom
- Purple square (p) at [41, 49] with magenta center - bottom right

So after clicking on [21, 8], the white diamond swapped with the dark gray diamond at that position. The white diamond is now at [21, 8].
Looking at the image, I can see:
- Top chain: dark gray diamond at [9,49], orange circle at [16,38], dark gray diamond at [18,57] (in purple outline)
- Bottom chain: white diamond at [21,8], dark gray diamond at [35,45], purple square at [41,49], dark gray diamond at [48,54]
- Orange diamond outline at bottom
The white diamond is now part of the bottom chain! It seems like the game allows the white diamond to swap between chains. Now I need to get the white diamond into the orange diamond outline target.
The orange diamond outline center is at (51, 40). Let me try clicking there to pull the white diamond to that target.
